posts.author: wayneq (wayne quick)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I delete unwanted boards when the delete button is greyed out?
The boards look like they are showing the deault information from initial set up. I believe they have been restored from either the archive or delete folder as they were not showing previously. Very annoying as there are multipul boards.
